title: Reporting a bug
description: How to report a bug or technical issue with WagerProof.

content.text: Found something that doesn't look right? We appreciate bug reports -- they help us improve the app for everyone.
Send an email to support@wagerproof.bet with the following information:

items: A description of what happened and what you expected to happen.
Steps to reproduce the issue (if possible).
Your device type and OS version (e.g. iPhone 15, iOS 18.2).
Screenshots or screen recordings showing the issue.
The WagerProof app version (found in Account settings).

content.text: The more detail you include, the faster we can identify and fix the issue.
